section_miscategorizations.text: Instruct patient to discontinue nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory medications.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This instruction conflicts with the simultaneous plan to start meloxicam, which is an NSAID. While it belongs in the Plan section, the contradictory content could mislead a reader about intended management; this is a content inconsistency rather than a pure section miscategorization, so only a minor organizational issue is noted.
